name: Cajun Catfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the fish fillets and pat dry.
2. In a bowl, mix the ground wheat flakes with all the seasonings. Dip each fillet into the seasoning mixture, coating both sides.
3. Heat the oil in a heavy cast iron frying pan. Fry the fillets for 2 minutes on each side. Place the fillets on a plate lined with paper towels, cover with another paper towel, and pat to remove excess oil.
